pr.title: docs(ideas): add Gin Frogs entry — armor-by-reproduction enemy
pr.body:
Captures the user's pitch (frog with neonatal froglets clinging to its
back, each contributing AV; biology inspiration: Suriname toad) as a
substantive IDEAS entry. Sketches concrete reuse of CombatSystem.
GetAV's armor aggregation path via a new BroodArmorPart, lays out
combat rhythm (stripping phase before kill phase), damage-type
modifiers, and open design questions: reproduction cadence, XP/loot
on shed babies, biome/faction placement, player-mirror feasibility,
name etymology.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
pr.author: stevenrichter16
